chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1885 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For orders on MA No.7047/2022. For orders on MA No.7048/2022. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 None present for the petitioner nor intimation received. This petition was filed in the year 2022 and for the first time, it came up in Court on 25.05.2022 when none was present on behalf of the petitioner no any intimation was communicated. Since then, this petition is pending without any progress. It shows that the petitioner has no interest in the proceedings. Consequently, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
